productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boy Men Journey to Petra Orange Tshirt
description: Composition White T-shirt with subliminal print on the front, made of environmentally friendly polyester, has short sleeves and a round neck Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print Dress your little one in this T-shirt from Green Gold's collection and watch him revel in the victory of chhota bheem and his friends over the villains at Petra. Crafted from soft polyester to wick sweat away and keep your little one fresh and comfortable all day, this tee offers exemplary comfort and looks great with denim trousers or shorts.
